anti_claims: This paper-module JSON row does not prove runtime correctness, release readiness, or whole-system completeness.
Legacy Markdown presence is not treated as source authority or as typed subject evidence.
Capsule-backed subject/code edges are structural references only; they do not prove implementation correctness.

compression.authority_ceiling: A clean result means the selected owner's declared no-write check passed and its required artifacts were present for the supplied root over bounded public fixtures. It is command-receipt-style evidence, not a semantic proof, not a file repairer, not full-registry validation, and not release/publication/source-mutation authority.
compression.card: Generated Projection Drift Runtime surfaces a public-safe drift gate over generated build artifacts. Each owner row pairs an artifact, its source authorities, and a no-write check command. The gate SHA-256-fingerprints source and artifact files, consults a prior-clean source-hash skip cache, requires declared artifacts to be present, and runs the owner check, marking an owner clean only on a zero return with present artifacts. Four bounded public fixtures exercise it: a passing no-write check, a genuine source-hash cache hit (the check is skipped), a planted artifact byte rejected as check_command_failed, and a missing required artifact rejected as artifact_missing. It flags drift; it does not repair files, prove content-diff equivalence for every macro builder, validate the whole registry, or authorize release.
compression.one_line: An owner-routed gate that fingerprints generated artifacts against their sources, uses a prior-clean skip cache, and runs each owner's no-write check to flag projection drift by recomputation.

omitted: public Markdown prose body round-trip equivalence
legacy-only subject edges not named by JSON capsules

code_loci.role: Surfaces the engine-room capsule as a first-class organ with the standard contract (bounded fixture cases, planted negatives, body-free receipts, result_card, CLI). _evaluate_case materialises each fixture's declared file tree into a per-case TemporaryDirectory scratch and calls the REAL capsule evaluate_case (no re-implementation, no baked answers); build_result returns status==pass only when both positives observe clean, both negatives are recomputed to drift carrying their expected status_reason marker, and the expected negative case ids are present.

Public-safe owner-routed generated-projection drift gate. Models each generated artifact as an owner row (artifact patterns, source authorities, a no-write check command); per owner it SHA-256-fingerprints source and artifact files, consults a prior-clean-receipt source-hash skip cache, enforces required-artifact presence and optional fact-authority lineage, then runs the owner's declared no-write check command and marks the owner clean only on a zero return with present artifacts. It is the drift authority, not a semantic content-diff proof, a repairer, or a release authority.
symbols: uses prior clean receipts as a bounded skip cache
